checklist.video_preprocessing: fps/resolution/frame_index recorded in metadata and per-frame records
checklist.detection: two stable role slots are exported every frame; source detector bbox score is preserved
checklist.tracking: exported tracker_id/source_tracker_id/stable_track_id are fixed to 0/1; raw detector IDs are preserved as raw_detector_tracker_id
checklist.bbox_postprocess: tracker bbox and pose crop bbox are both exported; WHAM xyxy/xywh are generated
checklist.pose_2d: raw/smoothed keypoints, confidence, masks, and per-keypoint source are exported
checklist.missing_handling: missing/occluded joints are masked; interpolated joints are low confidence
checklist.temporal_smoothing: bidirectional EMA reduces jitter without causal lag; raw observations remain available
checklist.formats: COCO17, OpenPose BODY25, and WHAM-style 2D JSON are generated
checklist.quality_report: coverage, ID switches, confidence, occlusion segments, and bbox jitter are reported
checklist.visualization: preview.mp4 overlays observed skeleton; low-confidence joints are hollow and not connected
